question: How many customers do we have in each country?
sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY country ORDER BY customer_count DESC

question: What is the total revenue per country?
sql: SELECT c.country, SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: Which 10 products generated the most revenue?
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.line_total) AS revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

question: List the top 5 customers by total spend.
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_spend FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many orders were placed each month last year?
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year' AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: Show all orders for customer 1.
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 1 ORDER BY order_date DESC

question: Which products are running low on stock (under 10 units)?
sql: SELECT product_id, name, stock_quantity FROM products WHERE stock_quantity < 10 ORDER BY stock_quantity ASC
